ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company's services and focus areas */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the company */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of activity the company is engaged in */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website URL */,
  "primary_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "primary_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "primary_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the company location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the company location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the company location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "login_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content or details of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the report */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., pharmaceutical, agribusiness) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES report_authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., organization, university) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_reviews_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_industries" (
  "company_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-industry pair */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_industries_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_services" (
  "company_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-service pair */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "service" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_services_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
